nonarch_load_bearing_control_fails.lesson: two archimedean encodings agreeing is not encoding-agnostic; the balance needs the non-archimedean place (drop it and the product formula != 1)

grader_clauses.PMG-D.1: the three-account balance closes (CL-G6): on every BALANCE cell the three accounts close (value == observed + residue, exact in ℚ, for the archimedean dyadic, archimedean CF, and non-archimedean 2-adic axes) AND the product formula |v|_∞·|v|_2·∏_{p odd}|v|_p == 1 exactly in ℚ. Registered as a MEASUREMENT (F9 discipline, §6.5): the adelic product-formula shape is OBSERVED to close, not asserted as a discovery. Units: cell.
grader_clauses.PMG-D.2: the non-archimedean place is LOAD-BEARING (CL-G6 content): on a v_2 != 0 cell, dropping the 2-adic account (archimedean-only product) breaks the balance (!= 1) — so 'encoding-agnostic' requires the genuinely-different non-archimedean place, NOT two agreeing archimedean encodings. Units: cell.
grader_clauses.PMG-D.3: non-archimedean closure + the lattice-floor box (CL-G8, PARTIAL): the 2-adic account closes its own residue (v == Φ_2(v,k) + R, v_2(R) >= k) on >=1 fixture; a 2-adic residue below the pinned floor 2^{-K} (v_2(R) > K) is REFUSED (`below_detection_2adic`), the non-archimedean analog of CL-G4. Full coverage NOT claimed. Units: cell.
grader_clauses.PMG-D.4: warrant refusal on holonomy extrapolation (CL-G8): a holonomy query at a budget OUTSIDE the pinned grid is REFUSED (`warrant_refused`), never silently extrapolated. Units: cell.
grader_clauses.PMG-D.5: determinism: the Stage-D record set is byte-identical across two runs (sha256 over records).

status_move_rules: CL-G6 -> DEMONSTRATED iff every balance cell closes (three accounts + product formula exact in ℚ) AND the non-archimedean place is shown load-bearing (archimedean-only breaks the balance on a v_2 != 0 cell); the product-formula shape is a REGISTERED measurement, not asserted (F9). CL-G8 -> PARTIAL (by design) demonstrated iff >=1 non-archimedean closure holds AND the floor box refuses below 2^{-K} AND the warrant refusal fires on an out-of-grid holonomy query; full refusal/encoding coverage is NOT claimed. REFUTE-ROW (continue): FAIL_balance (the product formula does not close in ℚ, or an account fails to close) -> CL-G6 REFUTED, scope reduced, chain preserved. PARTIAL until both runs match (PMG-D.5).
